evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: The JD mentions production-grade pipelines with testing and documentation (rigour signals) but is otherwise generic with no strong velocity or heavy rigour emphasis, landing on mixed given the sparse signal count.
evidence.domain_risk: help uncover business needs and how to support them with data, reporting, and visualization
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: This is a consultancy (Xebia) placing analytics engineers with client businesses for standard reporting work with no financial, regulatory, or compliance language present.
evidence.data_team_maturity: leverage modern tooling for data modeling, testing, and documentation
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: The JD references modern tooling and production-grade practice generically without indicating early-stage buildout or a large mature team, placing it at mid by default.
evidence.jd_authorship: help uncover business needs and how to support them with data, reporting, and visualization
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: The responsibilities are generic boilerplate about bridging business and analytics with no named tools, scale numbers, or specific methodology, typical of a consultancy's templated posting.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: leverage modern tooling for data modeling, testing, and documentation
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The emphasis on data modeling, testing, and documentation practices points toward serving the data function itself rather than a specific commercial, product, or finance audience.
evidence.autonomy_level: help uncover business needs and how to support them with data, reporting, and visualization
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The role is framed around supporting and uncovering needs defined by others (clients/stakeholders) rather than setting independent direction.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: The JD contains no mention of AI tools or AI-consuming infrastructure anywhere in the text.
evidence.testing_framing: leverage modern tooling for data modeling, testing, and documentation
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Testing is mentioned alongside modeling and documentation as part of the toolkit without an explicit ownership verb, making it tool_listed rather than a named responsibility.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: The JD is framed entirely around delivery, communication, and capability with no risk, compliance, or reliability register present.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: help uncover business needs and how to support them with data, reporting, and visualization
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: As a consultancy role serving varied clients, the JD doesn't clearly signal greenfield build or pure fix/scale work, so it is mixed.
evidence.work_arrangement: The modern Amsterdam office is dog-friendly.
